description: You are a platform security engineer at Apex Healthcare. A Q1 2026 internal security audit found that your CI/CD deployment pipelines are running as the Artifactory admin user with a long-lived API key — a critical violation of your SOC 2 compliance policy, which requires service accounts to use scoped, expiring tokens with least-privilege access. Remediate the compliance findings in Artifactory (http://localhost:8082, admin / password) by ensuring a non-admin service user named 'svc-deploy' exists with email 'svc-deploy@apex-healthcare.com' as a member of the 'ci-services' group. A local npm repository named 'npm-builds' (description: 'CI/CD npm artifact store') must be configured with a permission target named 'svc-deploy-perms' granting the 'ci-services' group Deploy and Read access. Generate a new access token for the 'svc-deploy' user with the description 'Service account token - Q1 2026 rotation' to replace the compromised credential.
